Text: Identify Grouping Criteria: The most obvious and reliable attributes for grouping are patient_age and patient_gender combined with department and the logical flow of activities. Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I should present the answer clearly defining each case listing its events in chronological order and explaining the rationale for the grouping Ill also assign them logical Case IDs eg Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 Lets structure the response State the inferred number of cases 3 For each case provide A descriptive ID eg Case 1 45M ER Patient The list of events in chronological order referencing original numbers A brief explanation of the clinical pathwaylogic Explain the grouping methodology used demographics department activity sequence timestamps Ensure all 18 events are mapped.
